evidence.commissioners: Board of Commissioners Position Experience Darma Mangkuluhur Hutomo received his Bachelor’s Degree from EU Business School in Barcelona in 2019. In addition to his role at GOLF, he President Commissioner 5+ serves as Commissioner at PT Wisma Purnayudha Putra, PT New Kuta Golf and Ocean View, and PT Sentul Golf Utama. Royani earned his Master’s Degree from UPN Veteran Jakarta in 2008. Before serving as GOLF’s independent commissioner (since 2023), he held Independent Commisioner 26+ positions at several departments in OJK, including Capital Market Regulatory Department and Development of Policy on Transparency of Issuers. Years of Board of Directors Position Experience Dwi Febri Astuti received her Bachelor’s Degree from STIE in 1995. In addition to her CEO role in GOLF, she President 29+ serves as President Director in PT New Kuta Golf and Director Ocean View and PT Belitung Golf and Resorts. Andy Nuryadmanto earned Master’s Degree in Construction Management from Universitas Atmajaya, Yogyakarta, in 2002. Alongside his role at Director 20+ GOLF, he serves as Director at PT New Kuta Golf and Ocean View and PT Belitung Golf and Resorts.
